3331940.name: Myths of Minerva: Stolen Sceptre
3331940.description:
A crisis has struck the Kingdom of Minerva! The sacred Sceptre of Fertility—a powerful artefact ensuring the kingdom’s fields flourish and crops thrive—has vanished! Tasked with its recovery are Fulvia Riverino, a skilled mage from the Royal Magic Academy, and Aurelia Verus, a valiant Palace Guard. As they embark on their mission, these two heroes will gather allies, explore dangerous lands, and face formidable foes in their quest to retrieve the stolen sceptre and prevent famine from overtaking the kingdom.

"Myths of Minerva: Stolen Sceptre" is a roguelite card battler with a rich fantasy storyline. Rely on your wits and strategy to guide your heroes through challenging battles and help them succeed in their vital quest to save the kingdom.

- An epic fantasy world

- Tactical card roguelite gameplay

- A detailed and gripping storyline

- Orchestral soundtrack
